---
title: "quarto-arrow"
subtitle: "Draw curved SVG arrows in Quarto documents"
---
A Quarto extension for drawing arrows with Bezier curves. Perfect for annotations, callouts, and visual explanations.

## Installation

```bash
quarto add emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow
```

## Quick Start

Add the filter to your YAML header:

```yaml
---
title: My Document
format: html
filters:
  - arrow
---
```

Then use the shortcode:
```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="200,100" */>}}
```

## Examples

### Basic Arrows

Straight lines, quadratic curves, and cubic Bezier curves.

[View Example](examples/basic.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Source Code](https://github.com/emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow/blob/main/examples/basic.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}

<iframe src="examples/basic.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>

### Styling Options

Colors, stroke widths, dash patterns, and arrowhead sizes.

[View Example](examples/styling.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Source Code](https://github.com/emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow/blob/main/examples/styling.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}

<iframe src="examples/styling.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>

### Arrowhead Styles

Multiple arrowhead styles: arrow, stealth, diamond, circle, square, bar, barbed, and none.

[View Example](examples/arrowheads.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Source Code](https://github.com/emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow/blob/main/examples/arrowheads.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}

<iframe src="examples/arrowheads.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>

### Line Styles

Dotted, double, and triple line patterns.

[View Example](examples/linestyles.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Source Code](https://github.com/emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow/blob/main/examples/linestyles.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}

<iframe src="examples/linestyles.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>

### Positioned Arrows

Absolute and fixed positioning for document-level annotations.

[View Example](examples/positioned.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Source Code](https://github.com/emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow/blob/main/examples/positioned.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}

<iframe src="examples/positioned.html" width="100%" height="400" style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>

### RevealJS Presentations

Arrows work in RevealJS slides for visual presentations.

[View Example](examples/revealjs.html){.btn .btn-primary}
[Source Code](https://github.com/emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow/blob/main/examples/revealjs.qmd){.btn .btn-secondary}

<iframe src="examples/revealjs.html" width="100%" height="500" style="border: 1px solid #ccc; border-radius: 4px;"></iframe>

## Syntax Reference

### Basic Usage

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="x1,y1" to="x2,y2" */>}}
```

### With Control Points

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="200,100" control1="125,0" */>}}
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="200,100" control1="100,0" control2="150,150" */>}}
```

### Styling Parameters

| Parameter | Default | Description |
|-----------|---------|-------------|
| `from` | required | Start point `"x,y"` |
| `to` | required | End point `"x,y"` |
| `control1` | - | First control point for curves |
| `control2` | - | Second control point (cubic Bezier) |
| `color` | `"black"` | Stroke color |
| `width` | `2` | Stroke width in pixels |
| `size` | `10` | Arrowhead size |
| `dash` | - | Dash pattern (e.g., `"5,5"` or `"true"`) |
| `line` | `"single"` | Line style (see below) |
| `opacity` | `1` | Stroke opacity (0-1) |
| `position` | - | `"absolute"` or `"fixed"` |
| `head` | `"arrow"` | Arrowhead style (see below) |
| `head-start` | `false` | Show arrowhead at start |
| `head-end` | `true` | Show arrowhead at end |
| `head-fill` | `true` | Filled (`true`) or outline (`false`) |
| `head-size` | `size` | Independent arrowhead size (overrides `size`) |

### Line Styles

| Style | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `single` | Default single line |
| `dot` | Dotted line pattern |
| `double` | Parallel double line |
| `triple` | Three parallel lines |

### Arrowhead Styles

| Style | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `arrow` | Default filled triangle |
| `stealth` | Pointed, angular military-style |
| `diamond` | Diamond/rhombus shape |
| `circle` | Round endpoint |
| `dot` | Alias for circle |
| `square` | Square endpoint |
| `bar` | Flat perpendicular line |
| `barbed` | Hook-like, open arrow |
| `none` | No arrowhead |

### Positioning Modes

**Inline (default):** Arrow renders in document flow.

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="200,100" */>}}
```

**Absolute:** Positioned relative to document body, scrolls with page.

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="600,80" to="780,15" position="absolute" */>}}
```

**Fixed:** Positioned relative to viewport, stays in place while scrolling.

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="100,100" to="300,50" position="fixed" */>}}
```

**Scoped Absolute:** Use inside a `position: relative` container.

```markdown
::: {style="position: relative;"}
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="200,100" position="absolute" */>}}
:::
```

## Format Support

| Format | Status | Notes |
|--------|--------|-------|
| HTML | Full support | All features available |
| PDF | Basic support | Static arrows only |
| Typst | Placeholder | Coming soon |
| RevealJS | Full support | Works in presentations |
| Other | Fallback | Renders as `->` text |

## Links

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow)
- [Report Issues](https://github.com/emilhvitfeldt/quarto-arrow/issues)
